name: WalkBuddy
description: WalkBuddy is a fitness app that encourages users to stay active by tracking their daily steps and providing personalized walking routes. It also connects users with nearby walking buddies for social support and motivation.
features: Step tracking with customizable goals and reminders
Personalized walking routes with safety features
Social networking for walking groups and challenges
Integrations with popular fitness trackers and wearables
Rewards for milestones achieved and leaderboards
target_audience: Individuals aged 25-60 seeking to improve their physical activity and stay motivated
